error.no_permission: ❌ You need **Manage Server** permission to manage social alerts.
error.limit: ❌ This server has reached the maximum of **{limit}** subscriptions. Remove one before adding more.
error.not_found: ❌ Subscription not found. It may have already been removed.
error.no_key: ❌ YouTube API key is not configured. Please contact the bot administrator.
error.no_changes: ⚠️ No changes were provided. Please pass at least one option.

duplicate.youtube: ⚠️ This server is already subscribed to **{name}** on YouTube!
duplicate.tiktok: ⚠️ This server is already subscribed to **{name}** on TikTok!
duplicate.instagram: ⚠️ This server is already subscribed to **{name}** on Instagram!

tiktok.not_found:
❌ TikTok account **{username}** does not exist or is private.

Double-check the username and make sure the account is public.

instagram.not_found:
❌ Instagram account **{username}** could not be found or is private.

Make sure the username is correct and the account is public.

success.footer: -# 📡 Use `/social-alert list` to view all subscriptions · `/social-alert remove` to unsubscribe

remove.success: ✅ Successfully removed the YouTube alert for **{name}**. This server will no longer receive notifications from that channel.

list.empty:
📭 No social media alerts are configured for this server yet.

Use `/social-alert add` to subscribe to a YouTube or TikTok creator!
list.footer: -# © {bot} · Polled every 5 minutes · Use `/social-alert remove` to unsubscribe

view.footer: -# Use `/social-alert setting edit` to change settings · `/social-alert list` to view subscriptions

instagram.default_message: **{channel}** just shared a new Instagram post!
instagram.label: 📸 New Post!
